examples.title: Ohm's Law
examples.content: V = IR (Voltage = Current × Resistance). Linear relationship: double the current, double the voltage.

examples.title: Cost of Gas
examples.content: Price = $3 per gallon. 1 gallon = $3, 10 gallons = $30, 20 gallons = $60. Linear.

examples.title: Newton's Second Law
examples.content: F = ma (Force = mass × acceleration). Double the mass, double the force needed. Linear relationship.
